You WON'T BELIEVE What This Politician Said About Climate Change — It Will SHOCK You!

Daily Buzz 3 hours ago 🔥 45K shares

In what critics are calling the MOST OUTRAGEOUS statement of the year, a prominent politician made remarks about climate change that have left the internet ABSOLUTELY FURIOUS.

The politician, speaking at a rally, said: "We need to balance economic growth with environmental protection."

People are LOSING THEIR MINDS over this comment. The internet has completely EXPLODED with reactions from both supporters and critics.

Advertisement

"This is absolutely DEVASTATING," said one Twitter user. "I can't believe someone would actually say this."

Others were quick to defend the statement, pointing out that it's actually a reasonable position held by many economists.

What do YOU think? Sound off in the comments below!
